title: Vibrant Multicolor Happy Birthday Prism Banner (3.6 meter) 1 Piece - Vibrant & Eye-Catching Party Decoration
features: HAPPY BIRTHDAY PRISM BANNER: Celebrate in style with this eye-catching vibrant multicolor happy birthday prism banner, guaranteed to bring an extra touch of festivity to any birthday celebration.
MULTICOLOR DESIGN: Featuring a dazzling array of colors, this stunning 3.6-meter-long prism banner is designed to capture the attention of all party-goers, making your celebration truly memorable.

EASY SETUP: This 1-piece banner is hassle-free to set up, with no need for additional items or complicated instructions; simply hang it in your desired location to instantly transform the space and enhance the party vibe.

PERFECT PARTY DECORATION: Ideal for any birthday party, the vibrant multicolor happy birthday prism banner is versatile enough to complement any theme or color scheme, adding a vibrant, unique flair to your special occasion.

HIGH-QUALITY MATERIAL: Made from premium quality materials, this 3.6-meter happy birthday prism banner is designed to last and to be reusable for multiple celebrations, ensuring you always have a fantastic decoration on hand for future parties.
description: Product Description Make your celebration more special with our Prismatic Foil "Happy Birthday" Banner. 1 Birthday Banner - 12 ft. This colorful prismatic banner features a "Happy Birthday" headline with fun and colorful design. This disposable prismatic banner is perfect for celebrating fun birthday parties. Made of durable foil material, this prismatic banner is very eye catching with high quality prints. This product is easy to assemble, install, and can be stored and re-used. Box Contains 1 x Banner
